name: musabkara-claude-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by Musab Kara — 14 plugins for Jira, code quality, Telegram, research, autonomous ops, Flutter/Firebase, Git/GitHub

plugins.name: telegram-bridge
plugins.description: Bidirectional Telegram bot for Claude Code — text, photo, document, voice (Whisper TR/EN). Persistent agent mode with Haiku.

plugins.name: ai-review
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR review via OpenRouter free models (Gemma 3 27B). $0 cost.

plugins.name: daily-check
plugins.description: Daily system health check — Ollama models, MCP servers, API keys, disk/RAM usage, token cost report.

plugins.name: sync-agents
plugins.description: Validate and sync agent .md frontmatter with agent-registry.json for Multi-Agent OS.

plugins.name: jira-suite
plugins.description: Complete Jira management — /jira-run loops, sprint dashboard, task routing, decision workflow, Atlassian MCP included.

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code audit, CLAUDE.md refinement, jCodeMunch indexing — security, performance, cost, cleanup scanning.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Web research, 12-category project analysis, PRD generation, autonomous Ralph execution. Fetch MCP included.

plugins.name: devtools-setup
plugins.description: Setup, migration, MCP config, secrets management, GitHub auth — /install, /bind, /migration, /add-mcp.

plugins.name: flutter-firebase
plugins.description: Flutter + Firebase MCP integration — build, test, hot reload, Firestore CRUD, Storage, Auth.

plugins.name: git-github
plugins.description: Git + GitHub MCP integration — PR creation, issue management, branch ops, code search, reviews.

plugins.name: sprint-planner
plugins.description: Sprint planning from PRD/analysis — epic/story generation, estimation, Jira task creation.

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Headless browser automation for AI agents — navigate, fill forms, click, screenshot, scrape, e2e test.

plugins.name: opencode-bridge
plugins.description: OpenCode (Zen) + Ollama local model bridge — free/local LLM switching, model management.
